title: Lost Death I
body:
![Assembly Name ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a959d84fcbc6b2c577cd201109b4424426354dc6.png)

_Description Type: RPG / Adventure / Story-driven_

## !!This version is without quests!!
If you want quests: 

[https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Qe8NJwTLpAu8MXa6C_nT1YOpIBUOyfdq/view?usp=sharing](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Qe8NJwTLpAu8MXa6C_nT1YOpIBUOyfdq/view?usp=sharing)

# Key Features: 

Storyline (available in English and Russian) 

Class system Character stat upgrades 

New types of armor and weapons 

Modified mobs and bosses 

Improved dimensions 

300+ mods

Some mods translated into Russian (check resource packs) 


# Installation: 
Download the build archive. 

Unpack into your Minecraft folder or use a launcher. 

Launch the game. 

P.S. This is my first experience in creating builds.(If you find an error or if it crashes, contact me) and this part was made as an introductory one (and to gain experience). Now the next one is being made, which will be more thought out.
